As per the regulatory guidelines classification of accounts as NPA is done Borrower wise and not Facility wise and hence, in case of non-payment of dues by the customer in case of any facility availed from the Bank and consequently the account is to be classified as NPA, all other loan accounts of the Borrower, with the Bank also shall be classified as NPA as per the guidelines issued by RBI and it shall entitle the Bank to recall all such loans/facilities availed by the same customer from the Bank, irrespective of the regular repayment in such accounts. 7.
